description: Trust + coordination infrastructure for the agent economy. 27 tools across 6 Colber modules.
name: io.github.Obi49/colber-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional JSON map of Colber service base URLs. Defaults to local ports 14001/14011/14021/14031/14041/14051. For the hosted Colber API, use api.colber.dev path-based URLs.
environmentVariables.name: COLBER_BASE_URLS

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token forwarded to the backend services. Leave empty for unauthenticated local development.
environmentVariables.name: COLBER_AUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: pino log level for stderr output (stdout is reserved for MCP JSON-RPC). One of: trace, debug, info, warn, error. Defaults to info.
environmentVariables.name: COLBER_LOG_LEVEL
